step_by_step_thinking:
Orthodontically treated midline diastema retention typically requires some form of orthodontic maintenance device because the space may reopen if no retention mechanism is utilized. The effectiveness of retainers varies depending on individual factors but bonded lingual retainers offer excellent retention due to their fixed nature and less visible appearance compared to removable appliances like Hawleys. Therefore,
\boxed{C} Based on the evidence regarding effective retention mechanisms following orthodontic treatments, bonded lingual retainers are known for their high success rate in maintaining tooth position changes permanently. They adhere directly to the teeth and do not rely on patient compliance over time, making them ideal for long-term stability. Thus,
